colleges.name: University of California (all campuses)
colleges.notes: One application covers all 9 UC campuses. Firm annual filing window Oct 1 - Nov 30 (occasionally extended a few days — never plan on it). No letters of recommendation for most applicants. 4 Personal Insight Questions (350 words each) from 8. Test-free: SAT/ACT never considered. Verify: https://admission.universityofcalifornia.edu/how-to-apply/

colleges.name: California State University (all campuses)
colleges.notes: Apply via Cal State Apply. Priority filing typically opens Oct 1 and closes in early December — deadlines vary by campus and program. Test-free. Verify: https://www.calstate.edu/apply

colleges.name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
colleges.notes: MIT uses its own application (not Common App). EA deadline Nov 1; RD is typically early January — verify at https://mitadmissions.org/apply/firstyear/deadlines-requirements/. SAT/ACT required.

colleges.name: Georgetown University
colleges.notes: Georgetown uses its own application. Restrictive EA typically Nov 1; RD typically mid-January — verify at https://uadmissions.georgetown.edu/applying/. SAT/ACT required.

colleges.name: ApplyTexas (Texas public universities)
colleges.notes: Texas public universities apply via ApplyTexas (goapplytexas.org). Priority deadlines vary by campus (UT Austin priority is typically Dec 1) — verify per campus. Top-10% automatic-admission rules apply to Texas residents.
